description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with softly rounded corners and a smooth, flat tabletop surface. The desk stands on four straight, slightly tapered legs, each positioned at the corners for stability. The wood grain is visible across the entire surface, giving it a natural and warm appearance. A dark horizontal support bar connects the legs beneath the tabletop, adding structural integrity and a subtle design accent. The desk has no visible drawers, shelves, or other attachments, emphasizing a minimalist and modern aesthetic. Its proportions suggest it is suitable for single-person use, such as writing or working on a laptop.
description: A minimalist rectangular wooden desk with rounded corners, four straight legs, and a visible wood grain finish. It features a dark support bar beneath the tabletop and no attached storage.
description_view_0: The desk is seen from the short end, showing two legs and the narrow width of the tabletop.
description_view_1: The desk is viewed from the long side, displaying all four legs, the full tabletop, and the dark support bar beneath.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this shows the opposite short end with two legs and the narrow tabletop.
description_view_3: This view matches view 1, showing the long side, all four legs, and the support bar.
attribute_orientation: The long side with the dark support bar is intended to face the user, serving as the front of the desk; the short sides are the ends.
